supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

payBundleAndCollect(bytes32).notice: Pays a token-bundle demand from an escrow and immediately collects that escrow.

payErc1155AndCollect(bytes32).notice: Pays the ERC1155 demand from an escrow and immediately collects that escrow.

payErc20AndCollect(bytes32).notice: Pays the ERC20 demand from an escrow and immediately collects that escrow.

payErc721AndCollect(bytes32).notice: Pays the ERC721 demand from an escrow and immediately collects that escrow.

payNativeAndCollect(bytes32).notice: Pays the native-token demand from an escrow and immediately collects that escrow.

permitAndPayBundleAndCollect(bytes32,(ui.notice: Permits all ERC20 bundle items, pays the bundle demand, and immediately collects the escrow.

permitAndPayErc20AndCollect(bytes32,uint.notice: Permits, pays the ERC20 demand from an escrow, and immediately collects that escrow.

permitAndPayWithErc20(address,uint256,ad.notice: Creates an ERC20 payment attestation using a permit instead of a pre-existing allowance.
